summary: Applied 6 of 6 HIGH-priority and 4 of 6 MEDIUM-priority suggestions from JUDGE iter 1. Net result: +1 node (DELLA), +12 edges, -2 edges, structural check + schema validation pass. Source % dropped from 45.6% to 42.5%. Coverage ratios for ANT, GIF1, SEEDSTICK, DA1 module substantially improved.

applied_suggestions.action: Added DELLA (PROTEIN_COMPLEX) node + edges Gibberellin⊣DELLA (E033) and DELLA→ANT (E028). Removed direct Gibberellin→Integument_Growth (N011) to preserve GA Perception Gate purity. New cascade: GA ⊣ DELLA → ANT → Integument_Growth → Seed_Size.
Added GRF→GIF1 (E146). GIF1 is_source automatically set to False by recompute. GIF1 coverage ratio rises from 0.12 to 0.25; combined with S007 reaches 0.38.
Added ANT→Integument_Growth (E030). ANT coverage ratio rises from 0.17 to 0.50.
Added SHB1→IKU2 (E040) and MINI3→IKU2 (E042). HAIKU pathway now matches canonical SHB1→MINI3→IKU1/IKU2 fan-out.
Added SEEDSTICK→Integument_Growth (E161). SEEDSTICK coverage ratio rises from 0.38 to 0.50.

Added AGG3→Seed_Size (E136) and ABI5⊣Seed_Size (E116). Did NOT add GIF1→Seed_Size (E149) to keep phenotype activator count at 5 (per CLAUDE.md hard rule '3-5 phenotype activators'). GIF1 already routes via Integument_Growth so phenotype effect is preserved.
applied_suggestions.rejected_subset: E149 GIF1→Seed_Size deferred — would push phenotype to 6 activators (above 5-cap). Indirect path via Integument_Growth is sufficient.

applied_suggestions.action: Routed BR signaling effects via BZR1: added BZR1→Endosperm_Proliferation (+1, E101 evidence) and BZR1⊣PRC2 (-1, E102 evidence). Direct hormone edges NOT added — preserves BR Perception Gate purity. BZR1 fan-out now 8 (out-degree not capped per BUILDER §10).
Added Auxin⊣PRC2 (E083). PRC2 inhibitor count rises to 2 (Auxin, BZR1).

Initially added AGG3→AGB1 (E133 curated direction) and removed AGB1→AGG3, but this orphaned AGB1 (no outgoing edge to phenotype). Reverted: kept network direction AGB1→AGG3 (sign +1) with E133 evidence and a note that the heterotrimer is mutually stabilising; modelled in single direction to avoid Trap 1 positive-feedback loop. AGG3 still has 2 activators (AGB1, GPA1).

rejected_suggestions.action: Cannot add WRI1 node — no curated edge connects WRI1 to any in-network node downstream. WRI1’s only curated outgoing edge (E128 WRI1→Seed_oil_content) targets a non-network process node. Adding WRI1 with only LEC1/2/FUS3 inputs would create a 3-input sink that violates BUILDER §1.1 Hard Rule 1 (no floating nodes / no path to phenotype).
rejected_suggestions.rejection_reason: Floating sink — no curated path to Seed_Size
rejected_suggestions.literature_gap_filed: WRI1→Storage_reserves needs curation; Step 1 LITERATURE REVIEW should add an edge connecting WRI1 to a phenotype-reachable node (e.g., Storage_reserves, ABI3, or fatty-acid synthesis intermediate).

rejected_suggestions.action: Did not add E170 Cell_Proliferation→Integument_Growth or E074 Endosperm_Proliferation→Integument_Growth.
rejected_suggestions.rejection_reason: Integument_Growth already at 15 inputs (well above 7-input soft cap) after adding ANT and SEEDSTICK. Adding two more process-to-process edges would push to 17, further degrading geometric-mean signal. The biology is captured indirectly: Cell_Proliferation→Ovule_size→Seed_Size and Endosperm_Proliferation→Seed_Size routes already in network.
Would create tight positive feedback FUS3↔LEC2 (Trap 1). Damping=0.7 may stabilise but not worth the convergence risk for a low-priority addition.
Self-positive-loop amplifies perturbations dramatically. Not justified for a low-priority addition.

rejected_suggestions.action: Did not remove direct Auxin→Integument_Growth and Auxin→Endosperm_Proliferation edges.
rejected_suggestions.rejection_reason: Mechanism improvement only. The direct edges are independently curated and removing them would lose mechanistic richness without clear gain. Auxin’s 3-edge fan-out (4 with new Auxin⊣PRC2) is acceptable.

literature_gaps_filed: WRI1→Storage_reserves or WRI1→Seed_Size needs curation to enable WRI1 inclusion
TPS1 / T6P / TOR / SnRK1 sugar-energy axis entirely missing from curated_edges.json
RGL2 (E131) and DELLA family GID1A/B receptors (E034, E035) not curated as in-network candidates
